title: SuperSteve
description: A Mod that is critical between flash killing (disrupting balance) and normal survival (bosses can be defeated)
body:
**_EN_US_**

Mod provides an incredibly powerful boss - **Super Steve**, and an advanced weapon that can easily defeat it - '**END OF PLZ * LITE**'.

SuperSteve incomplete defense removal, and other operations. When he dies, he drops a full set of **32k** lower bound alloy equipment (which cannot be destroyed). When named "**PLZLiZi**", its strength will increase, and when it dies, it will drop "**END OF PLZ * LITE**"

"**END OF PLZ * LITE**"can defeat some invincible creatures and provide some defense, but can only be removed from the backpack using the discard button (Q).

**_ZH_CN_**

Mod提供了一个无比强力的Boss——**超级史蒂夫**，和一把能轻松击败它的高级武器——"**END OF PLZ * LITE**"。

SuperSteve不完全防御移除等操作，死亡时掉落全套**32k**下界合金装备（无法破坏）。将其命名为“**PLZLiZi**”时攻防会提升，死亡时掉落"**END OF PLZ * LITE**"

"**END OF PLZ * LITE**"可以击败部分无敌生物、提供一定防御，只能使用丢弃键从背包中移除(Q)。
